query: kya bank dub sakta hai?
response_points: FD ₹5 lakh tak government insurance me covered hoti hai
SBI, HDFC, ICICI jaise bade banks ka risk bahut kam hota hai
poora paisa ek hi bank me rakhne ke bajaye split karna safe hota hai

query: mera paisa safe hai kya FD me?
response_points: FD generally safe investment mana jata hai
₹5 lakh tak DICGC insurance hota hai
trusted banks jaise SBI, HDFC choose karna better hota hai

query: FD karna safe hai ya nahi?
response_points: FD low-risk investment hai
returns fixed hote hain isliye uncertainty kam hoti hai
government insurance bhi hota hai up to ₹5 lakh

query: agar bank band ho gaya toh mera paisa?
response_points: ₹5 lakh tak paisa government insurance se mil jata hai
isliye bade banks me FD karna safer hota hai
multiple banks me paisa divide karna ek smart strategy hai

query: kya main FD beech me tod sakta hoon?
response_points: haan, aap FD time se pehle tod sakte ho
bank thoda penalty charge karta hai
emergency me yeh option useful hota hai

query: FD todne par kitna loss hota hai?
response_points: usually 0.5%–1% interest kam milta hai
exact penalty bank pe depend karti hai
short term FD todne par loss zyada noticeable hota hai

query: FD pe tax lagega kya?
response_points: haan FD interest pe tax lagta hai
bank TDS kaat sakta hai agar limit cross ho jaye
aap baad me ITR file karke adjust ya refund le sakte ho

query: TDS kyu kaat lete hain bank wale?
response_points: TDS government ka rule hai tax collect karne ke liye
bank interest dene se pehle tax ka part kaat leta hai
yeh final tax nahi hota, aap return file kar sakte ho

query: best FD kaha karu?
response_points: SBI safest options me se ek mana jata hai
HDFC aur ICICI stability aur service ke liye known hain
small finance banks higher interest dete hain par thoda risk bhi hota hai

query: SBI ya HDFC me FD better hai?
response_points: SBI government bank hone ke wajah se extra trust deta hai
HDFC private bank hai jahan service aur speed better hoti hai
interest rates dono me similar range me hote hain

query: post office FD safe hai kya?
response_points: post office FD government backed hoti hai
safety ke liye bahut log prefer karte hain
interest thoda banks se kam ho sakta hai

query: small finance bank FD safe hai kya?
response_points: small finance banks higher interest dete hain
₹5 lakh tak insurance yahan bhi apply hota hai
zyada paisa invest karte time diversify karna better hota hai

query: FD me kitna interest milta hai?
response_points: generally 6% se 9% ke beech interest milta hai
small finance banks thoda zyada dete hain
rate tenure aur bank pe depend karta hai

query: FD karne ke liye kya chahiye?
response_points: bank account hona chahiye
amount decide karna hota hai
tenure choose karna hota hai

query: minimum kitne paise se FD start hoti hai?
response_points: ₹1000 ya ₹5000 se FD start ho sakti hai
bank ke hisaab se minimum amount change hota hai
online FD me kabhi kabhi aur flexible options milte hain

query: FD aur savings account me kya difference hai?
response_points: FD me paisa lock hota hai aur interest zyada milta hai
savings account me paisa kabhi bhi nikal sakte ho
FD long-term saving ke liye better hota hai

query: FD ya mutual fund better hai?
response_points: FD safe hai par return kam hota hai
mutual fund me risk hota hai par return zyada ho sakta hai
safe play chahiye to FD better hai

query: FD me paisa double kitne time me hota hai?
response_points: interest rate pe depend karta hai
rule of 72 use kar sakte hain estimate ke liye
7% pe approx 10 saal me paisa double hota hai

query: FD automatic renew ho jata hai kya?
response_points: haan agar auto-renewal option on hai to ho jata hai
warna maturity ke baad paisa savings account me aa jata hai
renewal setting FD banate waqt choose kar sakte ho

query: FD me risk kya kya hote hain?
response_points: interest fixed hota hai to inflation ka risk hota hai
premature withdrawal pe penalty lagti hai
bank risk low hota hai par zero nahi
